rulings.Case Title: BRANDY A. TRUEMAN VS. CALIFORNIA RECONVEYANCE COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn For Order Vacating Dismissal On Equitable Grounds And Transferring Venue To The County Of Marin
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, June 21, 2013, line 10 - PLAINTIFF BRANDY TRUEMAN's Motion For Order Vacating Dismissal On Equitable Grounds And Transferring Venue To The County Of Marin. Plaintiff's Motion to Set Aside the Dismissal and Transfer Venue is DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain burden. Specifically, first and third elements of equitable relief are not adequately address in the motion. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: AMERICA PRADO GUERRERO VS. JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, June 21, 2013, line 1 - DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurrer to Second Amended Complaint is SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. Speculative damages/loss of money allegedly resulting from violation of CCC 2923.5 (SAC 67) cannot satisfy standing requirement for alleged violation of Penal Code 115. Plaintiff's opposition fails to address lack of particularity in 75-78 per Khoury v. Maly's of California, Inc. (1993) 14 Cal. App. 612; and privilege per CCC 47 and CCC 2924(d)(2).=(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GEN SHIBAYAMA et al VS. BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, June 21, 2013, line 2 - DEFENDANT SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING, INC.'s DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurrer to Second Amended Complaint is OFF CALENDAR, dismissal filed May 29, 2013. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DONALD A. FINEOUT VS. POLK SENIOR HOUSING ASSOCIATES, L.P. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, June 21, 2013, line 3 - DEFENDANT POLK SENIOR HOUSING ASSOCIATES, L.P., POLK SENIOR HOUSING LLC and TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendants' Demurrer to First Amended Complaint is OVERRULED. Demurrer to the first cause of action is not supported by Points and authorities; Duty is sufficiently alleged under Biakanja; prospective economic "lessor-lessee" relationship and independent wrongful act, i.e. negligence are sufficiently alleged. Defendant's counsel is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C in future. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANNABELLE D ABRIGO VS. COUNTRYWIDE, INC.
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, June 21, 2013, line 4 - DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA N.A., COUNTRYWIDE HOME LOANS, INC., RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A. and MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Defendants' Demurrer to Complaint is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND to allege standing re: PSA; to allege fraud with particularity; to allege all elements of slander of title and quiet title including tender; to allege standing under UCL; to allege a cause of action for declaratory relief in light of Gomes, Fontenot and Calvo. Defendants' counsel is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C in future. =(501/REQ)
